overview: Inner-Self is a psychological personality platform on the Internet Computer with four interactive quizzes: Animal Archetype, Emotion, Know Your Dark Side, and Seven Deadly Sins. Users discover their personality through scientifically-informed assessments with detailed result screens, share features, and full result history. Admins manage all users and quiz data through a secure dashboard.
features: Seven Deadly Sins Quiz (40 questions, 7 sin categories, percentage scoring)
Emotion Quiz (10 emotions with philosophical insights)
Know Your Dark Side Quiz (7 types: MBTI blends + Dark Triad)
Dominant sin result screen with pie chart and personalized insight
Share Your Result button on all quiz result pages
Admin dashboard with sin distribution pie chart and results table
User dashboard showing full history of all four quiz attempts
Secure login and signup with security question password recovery
On-chain storage via Motoko canister on Internet Computer
